Steps: 1. Install app on Android device. 2. Tap 'Sign in with Google'. 3. Select Google account from native picker. 4. Wait for dashboard to load.
Expected Result: Google OAuth completes. Dashboard shows shop name and data from Firestore. No crash or blank screen.

Steps: 1. Open app in Chrome (https://stores.tulasierp.com/app). 2. Click 'Sign in with Google'. 3. Complete OAuth in popup window.
Expected Result: Popup closes automatically. Web dashboard loads with shop data. URL changes to /billing or /dashboard.

Steps: 1. Open Windows desktop app. 2. Click 'Sign in with Google'. 3. Complete OAuth in default browser.
Expected Result: Desktop app receives OAuth code via DesktopLoginBridgeScreen. Dashboard loads. App stays responsive.

Steps: 1. Tap 'Register' on login screen. 2. Fill name + email + password. 3. Check email for verification. 4. Complete shop setup wizard.
Expected Result: Account created in Firebase Auth. Email verification sent. Shop setup wizard appears after verify. Dashboard loads after setup.

Steps: 1. Enter registered email + password on login screen. 2. Tap 'Sign In'.
Expected Result: Dashboard loads with correct shop data. Auth state persists on app restart.

Steps: 1. Tap 'Forgot Password?' on login. 2. Enter email and tap 'Send Reset Link'. 3. Open email and click reset link. 4. Set new password and login.
Expected Result: Reset email received within 60 seconds. 60-second cooldown enforced on resend button. New password works on login.

Steps: 1. Register with email but do NOT verify. 2. Login and check for verification banner.
Expected Result: Yellow banner shows 'Verify your email'. Tap 'Resend' sends new verification email. Banner disappears after verification.

Steps: 1. Register new account. 2. Fill shop name + owner name + phone. 3. Enter GST (optional) + address. 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Shop profile saved to Firestore. Dashboard shows shop name. Products/bills lists are empty for new shop.

Steps: 1. Tap 'Try Demo' on login screen. 2. Browse sample products/bills/customers. 3. Tap 'Exit Demo' on the floating banner.
Expected Result: Demo loads with pre-populated data. All features browsable. Exit clears demo data and returns to login screen. No demo data persists.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /staff-login. 2. Enter staff email. 3. Enter 4-digit PIN.
Expected Result: Staff authenticated. App navigates to role-based home route (e.g. /billing for cashier or /kitchen for chef). Only permitted routes visible in navigation.
Pre-Condition: Staff account with PIN created by owner

Steps: 1. Tap profile icon then 'Sign Out'. 2. Confirm in logout dialog. 3. Try pressing back button.
Expected Result: Write retry queue syncs pending data before logout. Session cleared. Login screen shown. Back button does not return to dashboard.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /super-admin/login. 2. Enter admin email + password.
Expected Result: Admin dashboard loads with user stats. Non-admin emails rejected with error. Failed attempts tracked.
Pre-Condition: Admin email in Firestore super_admins collection

Steps: 1. Open POS (/billing). 2. Search and add 3 products to cart. 3. Tap 'Checkout'. 4. Select 'Cash' and enter received amount. 5. Tap 'Complete'.
Expected Result: Bill created with correct subtotal/tax/total. Receipt generated. Bill appears in /bills history. Change calculated if overpaid.

Steps: 1. Open POS and add products. 2. Checkout and select 'UPI' or 'Card'. 3. Complete payment.
Expected Result: Bill created with payment method recorded as UPI/Card. Shows in bills history with correct payment type. Filterable by method.

Steps: 1. Open POS and add products. 2. Checkout and select 'Udhaar'. 3. Select or add customer. 4. Complete.
Expected Result: Bill created. Customer's outstanding balance increases in Khata. Transaction logged with timestamp.

Steps: 1. Open POS and add products. 2. In checkout apply percentage or flat discount. 3. Complete bill.
Expected Result: Discounted total is correct. Original and discounted amounts both shown on receipt. Discount amount recorded in bill document.

Steps: 1. Open POS and add products. 2. Enter coupon code at checkout. 3. Complete bill.
Expected Result: Coupon validated (active + not expired + min order met + usage limit OK). Discount applied. Coupon usage count incremented in Firestore.

Steps: 1. Create coupon with past expiry date. 2. Try applying it in POS at checkout.
Expected Result: Error message: coupon expired/invalid. No discount applied. Proper user-friendly error shown.

Steps: 1. Complete a bill. 2. Tap 'Share' and select WhatsApp.
Expected Result: Formatted bill text with shop name items total and payment method sent via WhatsApp share sheet. No crash.

Steps: 1. Complete a bill. 2. Tap 'Share' and select SMS.
Expected Result: Bill summary sent via SMS with correct amount and shop details.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /gst-export. 2. Select month using calendar icon. 3. Tap 'Generate GST Summary'.
Expected Result: Monthly GSTR-1 data generated. GST-qualified bills grouped correctly. Export downloadable as CSV.
Pre-Condition: Bills with GST in selected month

Steps: 1. Navigate to /bills. 2. Filter by date range. 3. Filter by payment method. 4. Search by bill number.
Expected Result: Filters narrow results correctly. Search finds exact bill. Bill detail shows all items/payment info.

Steps: 1. Open POS and tap barcode/camera icon. 2. Point camera at product barcode. 3. Wait for scan.
Expected Result: Barcode decoded. Product found by barcode field. Added to cart with qty 1. Torch toggle available in scanner.

Steps: 1. In POS scan a barcode not matching any product.
Expected Result: 'Product not found' dialog appears. Option to add new product with scanned barcode pre-filled in AddProductModal.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /orders and tap '+'. 2. Select 'Dine-in' and pick a table. 3. Search and add products. 4. Tap 'Place Order'.
Expected Result: Order created with auto-generated order number. Table status changes to 'occupied'. Order appears in Active Orders list and Kitchen Display.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /orders and tap '+'. 2. Select 'Takeaway'. 3. Add products and place order.
Expected Result: Order created without table assignment. Appears in Active Orders with 'Takeaway' type badge.

Test Name: Order Item Status Flow in KDS
Steps: 1. Create order with 3 items. 2. Open Kitchen Display (/kitchen). 3. Mark items: Pending to Preparing to Ready to Served.
Expected Result: Each item status updates in real-time on both Kitchen Display and Order Detail screen. Order auto-advances to 'Ready' when all items ready.

Steps: 1. Open order detail for a ready order. 2. Tap 'Generate Bill'. 3. Select payment method and complete.
Expected Result: Bill generated from order items. Order status changes to 'Billed'. Table freed (status returns to 'available'). Bill appears in /bills.
Pre-Condition: Active order with all items ready/served

Steps: 1. Open order and tap 'Split Bill'. 2. Set split count (e.g. 3). 3. Choose equal split or item-wise assignment. 4. Complete each split payment.
Expected Result: Order total divided correctly. Each split generates separate payment. Sum of all splits = original total. Rounding handled correctly.

Steps: 1. Open active order detail. 2. Tap 'Cancel Order'. 3. Confirm cancellation.
Expected Result: Order status changes to 'Cancelled'. Table freed if dine-in. Items removed from Kitchen Display. No bill generated.

Steps: 1. Open active order. 2. Tap 'Add Items'. 3. Select additional products. 4. Submit.
Expected Result: New items added with new KOT number. Amendment KOT appears in Kitchen Display showing only new items. Order total updated.

Steps: 1. Open Order Billing screen for a ready order. 2. Apply service charge percentage. 3. Apply discount. 4. Complete.
Expected Result: Service charge calculated on subtotal. Discount applied after service charge. Final total = subtotal + service charge - discount + tax.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /khata. 2. Tap '+' and fill name + phone. 3. Save.
Expected Result: Customer created in Firestore. Appears in customer list. Balance starts at 0.

Steps: 1. Open customer detail. 2. Tap 'Give Udhaar'. 3. Enter amount + optional note. 4. Save.
Expected Result: Customer outstanding balance increases by amount. Transaction logged with timestamp and note. Appears in customer history.

Steps: 1. Open customer detail. 2. Tap 'Record Payment'. 3. Enter amount + select payment method. 4. Save.
Expected Result: Customer balance decreases. Payment transaction logged. Running balance correct after multiple transactions.

Steps: 1. Open customer detail with outstanding balance. 2. Tap 'Send Payment Link'.
Expected Result: UPI payment link generated with correct amount and merchant UPI ID. Link shareable via WhatsApp/SMS.
Pre-Condition: Customer with balance + UPI configured in settings

Steps: 1. Open /khata. 2. Type partial name in search. 3. Change sort order (name/balance/recent).
Expected Result: Search filters list in real-time. Sort reorders correctly. Stats panel (total due and collected) updates accordingly.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /products. 2. Tap '+'. 3. Fill name + price + category. 4. Set stock quantity + barcode (optional). 5. Save.
Expected Result: Product created in Firestore. Appears in product list and POS search. Sync badge shows synced status.

Steps: 1. Open product detail. 2. Change price and name. 3. Save.
Expected Result: Product updated. New price reflected in POS immediately on next search.

Steps: 1. Open product detail. 2. Tap 'Delete' and confirm.
Expected Result: Product removed from POS search. Historical bills still reference old product data correctly.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /products. 2. Tap 'Import CSV'. 3. Select CSV file with product data.
Expected Result: Products parsed from CSV. Preview shown before import. On confirm all products created. Duplicate handling works.

Steps: 1. Open POS. 2. Type product name in search bar. 3. Tap category tabs to filter.
Expected Result: Products filter in real-time. Category tabs narrow results. Results show name + price + stock. Grid and list views toggle.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /tables. 2. Tap '+'. 3. Set table number + capacity + floor. 4. Save.
Expected Result: Table created. Appears on table grid. Status shows 'Available' (green). Table selectable when creating dine-in orders.

Steps: 1. Create dine-in order for table (table becomes Occupied/red). 2. Complete order (table returns to Available/green). 3. Create reservation (table shows Reserved/orange).
Expected Result: Table color and status change in real-time on /tables screen. Status matches across all devices viewing same tables.

Test Name: Table Layout Editor Drag and Drop
Steps: 1. Open /table-layout. 2. Drag tables to new positions. 3. Change shapes (round/square). 4. Save layout.
Expected Result: Layout positions (posX/posY) and shapes saved to Firestore. Layout persists on reload. Other devices see updated layout.

Steps: 1. Open /table-layout. 2. Tap QR icon on a table. 3. Download or print QR code.
Expected Result: QR generated with URL /menu/:hotelId?table=:tableId. Scanning opens customer menu linked to that table.

Steps: 1. Create new dine-in order. 2. Navigate to /kitchen.
Expected Result: Order card appears with table number + items list + timestamps. Items show as 'Pending' initially. Multiple orders in grid layout.

Steps: 1. On Kitchen Display tap item to change to 'Preparing'. 2. Tap again to change to 'Ready'.
Expected Result: Item status badge updates in real-time. Order auto-advances to 'Ready' when all items ready. Status syncs to Order Detail screen.

Steps: 1. Connect thermal printer. 2. Place new order (or add items to existing).
Expected Result: ESC/POS formatted KOT prints with: order number + table + items with quantities + special instructions + timestamp. Amendment KOT shows only new items.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reservations. 2. Tap '+'. 3. Fill guest name + phone + party size + date/time + table. 4. Save.
Expected Result: Reservation created with 'Pending' status. Shows in today's list if date is today. Assigned table shows 'Reserved' status.

Steps: 1. Create reservation (Pending). 2. Confirm (Confirmed). 3. Guest arrives and seat (Seated). 4. Complete order (Completed).
Expected Result: Each status transition updates in real-time. Table becomes occupied on seating. Timeline visible in reservation detail.

Steps: 1. Cancel a pending reservation. 2. Mark a confirmed reservation as No-Show.
Expected Result: Cancelled reservation frees the table slot. No-Show recorded. Both statuses are final and cannot be reversed.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /combos. 2. Tap '+'. 3. Name combo + select component products + set combo price. 4. Save.
Expected Result: Combo created. Shows in combo list. Available in POS as single item at combo price. Individual items listed on receipt.
Pre-Condition: Products exist to include in combo

Steps: 1. Navigate to /daily-specials. 2. Toggle specific products as today's special.
Expected Result: Toggled products marked with star badge. Show in customer menu under 'Specials' section. Toggle persists for the day.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /staff. 2. Tap '+'. 3. Fill name + email + role (waiter/chef/cashier/manager) + 4-digit PIN. 4. Save.
Expected Result: Staff created in Firestore. Can login with email+PIN at /staff-login. Role determines permitted routes.

Steps: 1. Create staff with PIN 1234. 2. Try creating another staff with same PIN 1234.
Expected Result: Error: 'PIN already in use'. PIN must be unique across all active staff members.

Steps: 1. Login as waiter — verify can see: billing + orders + tables + kitchen + my-attendance. 2. Login as chef — verify: kitchen + orders. 3. Login as cashier — billing + bills + khata. 4. Login as manager — all except super_admin.
Expected Result: Each role sees only permitted routes. Attempting blocked route redirects to home. Navigation items filtered by role.

Steps: 1. Open staff member and tap 'Permissions'. 2. Enable 'Reports' access for a waiter. 3. Login as that waiter.
Expected Result: Custom permission overrides role default. Waiter can now access /reports. Other route restrictions still enforced.

Steps: 1. Login as staff and tap 'Clock In'. 2. Work for some time. 3. Tap 'Clock Out'. 4. Check attendance record in /attendance.
Expected Result: Clock-in timestamp recorded. Clock-out updates record. Hours worked calculated correctly. Record visible in both /attendance and /my-attendance.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /shifts. 2. Create shift (morning/afternoon/night) for staff. 3. Assign to date range.
Expected Result: Shifts visible in week/calendar view. Staff can see their schedule in /my-attendance.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /tasks. 2. Create task with title + assignee + priority + due date. 3. Assignee views and updates task status.
Expected Result: Task appears in board. Status transitions: pending to in-progress to completed. Overdue tasks highlighted. Completion timestamp logged.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /salary. 2. Select staff and month. 3. Review calculated salary.
Expected Result: Salary calculated from attendance hours and rate. Overtime computed. Deductions and advances subtracted.
Pre-Condition: Staff with attendance records for the month

Steps: 1. Navigate to /cash-register. 2. Open register with opening balance amount. 3. Complete a few cash bills. 4. Close register.
Expected Result: Opening balance set. Cash movements tracked. Closing balance = opening + cash sales - cash out. Discrepancy highlighted if mismatch.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /messages. 2. Send message to specific staff or broadcast to all. 3. Recipient checks messages.
Expected Result: Message delivered and visible. Read receipts tracked (readBy array). Broadcast visible to all staff.

Test Name: Add Ingredient with Low Stock Alert
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ingredients. 2. Tap '+'. 3. Fill name + stock quantity + minimum level + unit. 4. Save. 5. Reduce stock below minimum.
Expected Result: Ingredient created. When stock falls below minimum level a low stock indicator appears on ingredient card.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /vendors. 2. Add vendor with name + contact + supply items. 3. Record purchase. 4. Record payment.
Expected Result: Vendor created. Purchase increases vendor balance. Payment decreases balance. Settlement history tracked.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /wastage. 2. Log wastage: ingredient + quantity + reason. 3. Save.
Expected Result: Wastage recorded. Ingredient stock auto-deducted. Estimated cost calculated. Visible in wastage history.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /licenses. 2. Add license: type (FSSAI/GST/Trade) + number + issue date + expiry date. 3. Check urgency badges.
Expected Result: License created. Urgency levels: expired (red) / critical <30d (orange) / warning 30-90d (yellow) / ok (green). Color-coded badges shown.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /equipment. 2. Add equipment with name + next service date. 3. Add service record.
Expected Result: Equipment tracked. Service overdue alert shown if past due date. Service history maintained with dates.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /complaints. 2. Log complaint with description + category. 3. Update status through lifecycle to resolve.
Expected Result: Complaint logged with timestamp. Status flow: open to acknowledged to resolved. Resolution time calculated. Active complaints filterable.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /events. 2. Create event: name + client + date + total amount + advance received. 3. Track remaining balance.
Expected Result: Event created. Balance due = total - advance calculated automatically. Upcoming events listed by date.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /coupons. 2. Create coupon: code + type (% or flat) + value + validity dates + min order + max discount + usage limit. 3. Use coupon in POS checkout.
Expected Result: Coupon created. Validation checks all constraints. Correct discount applied to bill. Usage counter incremented.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /feedback or open public link /rate/:hotelId. 2. Rate food/service/ambiance (1-5 stars). 3. Add comment and phone (optional). 4. Submit.
Expected Result: Feedback saved in Firestore. Average rating recalculated. Visible in /feedback-dashboard. Public URL submissions require no auth.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /feedback-dashboard. 2. Review average ratings and recent reviews. 3. Filter by date range.
Expected Result: Dashboard shows aggregated ratings. Recent feedback cards with stars + comments + timestamps. Date filter works correctly.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /dashboard. 2. Switch period: today / this week / this month / custom range. 3. Tap 'Export PDF'.
Expected Result: Sales totals + order counts + payment method breakdown shown correctly. PDF export generates accurate report. Share via WhatsApp/email works.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reports/pnl. 2. Select date range.
Expected Result: Revenue + expenses + net profit calculated correctly. Expense categories itemized. Data matches actual bills.
Pre-Condition: Bills + expenses exist in date range

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reports/menu-performance.
Expected Result: Top selling items + revenue per item + popularity rankings shown. Data matches actual bill items sold.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reports/peak-hours.
Expected Result: Hourly/daily heatmap of order volume. Busiest hours highlighted. Data matches actual order timestamps.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reports/item-sales.
Expected Result: Per-product quantity sold + revenue + average price. Sortable columns. CSV export works.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reports/comparative. 2. Select two periods to compare.
Expected Result: Side-by-side comparison of sales + orders + revenue. Percentage change calculated. Growth/decline indicators correct.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reports/weekly.
Expected Result: Auto-generated weekly summary with key metrics. Day-by-day breakdown. Comparison with previous week shown.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /reports/feedback.
Expected Result: Aggregated feedback scores + trends + breakdown by category. Matches actual feedback submissions.

Test Name: Data Export CSV/PDF from Any Report
Steps: 1. Open any report screen. 2. Tap 'Export' and select CSV or PDF. 3. Download or share file.
Expected Result: File generated with correct data. CSV opens in spreadsheet apps. PDF formatted with shop branding. File downloadable/shareable.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /settings/general. 2. Edit shop name + address + phone + logo. 3. Save.
Expected Result: Profile updated in Firestore. New shop name appears in navigation and receipts. Logo shown on receipts. Changes persist on restart.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /settings/billing. 2. Set GSTIN + tax rate + invoice prefix. 3. Create new bill and check receipt.
Expected Result: GST number printed on receipt. Tax calculated at configured rate. Invoice number uses set prefix. Footer text customizable.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /settings/theme. 2. Change primary color + toggle dark mode + adjust font scale (0.8-1.4x). 3. Apply.
Expected Result: Theme updates instantly across all screens. Font scale affects all text. Settings sync to other devices via Firestore.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /settings/account. 2. Update phone + upload profile image. 3. Check referral code and subscription info.
Expected Result: Profile updated. Image uploaded. Referral code visible and shareable. Subscription tier and usage limits displayed.

Steps: 1. Go to Settings > Hardware > Bluetooth tab on Android. 2. Tap 'Scan'. 3. Select thermal printer from list. 4. Tap 'Test Print'.
Expected Result: Nearby Bluetooth printers discovered. Pairing completes. Status shows connected. Test receipt prints with shop info.

Steps: 1. With BT printer connected complete a bill in POS.
Expected Result: Receipt auto-prints via ESC/POS: shop name + items with qty and price + subtotal + tax + total + payment method + footer. Formatting correct on 58mm/80mm paper.

Steps: 1. Go to Settings > Hardware > USB tab on Windows. 2. Tap Refresh. 3. Select printer from list. 4. Tap 'Test Print'.
Expected Result: Windows system printers listed. Selection saved and persists. Test page prints via RAW mode. No Windows print dialog shown.

Steps: 1. With USB printer selected complete a bill on Windows.
Expected Result: Receipt sent to selected USB printer via RAW mode. Formatted output with all bill details. Prints without Windows dialog.

Steps: 1. Connect any printer. 2. Place new dine-in order.
Expected Result: KOT auto-prints: order number + table + items + quantities + special instructions + timestamp. Kitchen receives printout.

Test Name: UPI Deep Link Opens App Chooser
Steps: 1. Generate payment link for a specific amount. 2. Open link on Android phone.
Expected Result: UPI app chooser appears immediately (GPay/PhonePe/Paytm). Merchant UPI ID and amount pre-filled correctly.

Steps: 1. Generate payment link for Rs 500 (am=500 in URL). 2. Open on Android and select UPI app.
Expected Result: UPI app shows Rs 500 pre-filled in amount field. Payee name shown correctly. Payment completable.

Steps: 1. Open payment page on desktop browser. 2. Scan displayed QR code with phone's UPI app.
Expected Result: QR renders correctly. Phone UPI app reads amount + merchant details. Payment can proceed normally.

Steps: 1. Open payment link on device without UPI app. 2. Tap 'Pay Now'.
Expected Result: Fallback dialog shows UPI ID as copyable text. User can manually enter in their UPI app.

Steps: 1. Open /pay?pa=merchant@okaxis&am=100&pn=ShopName in browser.
Expected Result: Payment page loads. QR code on desktop shows Rs 100 to merchant@okaxis. Mobile redirects to UPI app with pre-filled details.

Steps: 1. Open /menu/:hotelId on phone browser (no login needed).
Expected Result: Menu loads with products grouped by category. Prices shown. Daily specials highlighted. No login prompt. Fast loading.

Steps: 1. Open /order/:hotelId. 2. Browse menu and add items. 3. Submit order.
Expected Result: Order placed without customer login. Confirmation shown with order number. Order appears in restaurant's active orders.

Steps: 1. Customer places order and receives status link. 2. Open order status page.
Expected Result: Real-time order status shown. Progress steps: Placed > Preparing > Ready > Served. Auto-refreshes via Firestore stream.

Steps: 1. Open /reserve/:hotelId. 2. Fill guest name + phone + party size + date/time. 3. Submit.
Expected Result: Reservation created without login. Confirmation shown. Appears in restaurant's /reservations list. Form validation works.

Steps: 1. Open /rate/:hotelId. 2. Rate food/service/ambiance (1-5 stars). 3. Submit.
Expected Result: Rating saved without login. Visible in restaurant's feedback dashboard. Phone field optional. Success confirmation shown.

Steps: 1. Generate QR from /table-layout for Table 5. 2. Customer scans QR with phone camera.
Expected Result: QR opens customer menu with table context. Customer can view menu and place order linked to Table 5.

Steps: 1. Turn off WiFi/data on device. 2. Create bill in POS and complete payment. 3. Turn connectivity back on.
Expected Result: Bill created locally and stored offline. 'Not Synced' badge shown. When online bill auto-syncs to Firestore. Badge updates to 'Synced'.

Steps: 1. Create bill while network is flaky (intermittent connectivity). 2. Observe retry behavior. 3. Wait for stable connection.
Expected Result: Failed writes queued automatically. Retried with exponential backoff (1s > 2s > 4s > 8s > 16s). Max 5 retries. Dead-letter after 5 failures. No data loss.

Steps: 1. Open web app in Chrome. 2. Go offline (DevTools > Network > Offline). 3. Create bill. 4. Go back online.
Expected Result: Bill saved to IndexedDB locally. When online syncs to Firestore. Data available after hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R).
Pre-Condition: App loaded online before going offline

Steps: 1. Log into same account on two devices. 2. Add product on Device A. 3. Check Device B.
Expected Result: Product appears on Device B within seconds via Firestore real-time listener. Same sync works for bills + customers + orders.

Steps: 1. Edit same product on two devices simultaneously. 2. Save on both.
Expected Result: Last-write-wins by Firestore server timestamp. Both devices eventually show same final value. No data corruption or crash.
Pre-Condition: Same product open on two devices

Steps: 1. Change theme color on Device A. 2. Check Device B settings within 30 seconds.
Expected Result: Theme change syncs via OfflineStorageService to Firestore. Device B reflects same color after sync interval.

Steps: 1. Trigger action that generates notification (e.g. low stock alert or new customer order). 2. Check notification shade.
Expected Result: Push notification appears with correct title and body. Tapping opens relevant screen in app.

Steps: 1. Allow browser notifications when prompted. 2. Trigger notification (background tab).
Expected Result: Browser push notification appears. Service worker handles background notification. Click opens app at correct screen.

Steps: 1. Trigger notification-worthy event on Windows app.
Expected Result: Windows toast notification appears in bottom-right corner. Message content correct and clickable.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /notifications. 2. Review notification list.
Expected Result: Unread count badge on bell icon. Notification list with timestamps. Mark as read works. Filter by type available.

Test Name: Admin Broadcast Push to All Users
Steps: 1. Super Admin opens /super-admin/notifications. 2. Compose title + body. 3. Tap 'Send to All'.
Expected Result: FCM push sent to all users with registered tokens. Notification appears on target devices with correct title and body.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /subscription. 2. Review current plan and usage.
Expected Result: Current tier shown (free/starter/pro/enterprise). Usage vs limits displayed (products + bills + customers count). Upgrade options visible.

Steps: 1. On Web navigate to /subscription. 2. Select higher plan. 3. Complete Razorpay payment flow.
Expected Result: Razorpay payment modal opens. Payment processed. Plan upgraded immediately. Limits increased. Confirmation shown.

Steps: 1. On Android open /subscription. 2. Select plan. 3. Complete Google Play purchase flow.
Expected Result: Google Play Billing dialog shown. IAP processed. Plan upgraded. New tier limits reflected immediately.

Steps: 1. Reach product limit on free plan. 2. Try adding another product.
Expected Result: Upgrade prompt modal appears with trigger reason ('product limit reached'). Cannot add without upgrading. 'View Plans' button navigates to /subscription.

Steps: 1. Use app for eligible period (configurable). 2. Complete a bill.
Expected Result: NPS survey dialog appears with 0-10 score chips. Submit disabled until score selected. Response saved to Firestore.
Pre-Condition: Account eligible for NPS by usage duration

Steps: 1. Login as super admin. 2. Navigate to /super-admin.
Expected Result: Total users + active subscriptions + MRR + recent user list shown. Stats load correctly and are refreshable.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /super-admin/users. 2. Search users by name/email. 3. Open user detail. 4. Edit subscription or disable account.
Expected Result: User list with search/filter. Detail shows usage + plan + dates. Plan change persists. Disabled user blocked from login.
Pre-Condition: Super admin access with existing users

Steps: 1. Navigate to /super-admin/errors.
Expected Result: Grouped errors from ErrorLoggingService. Error message + stack trace + app version + platform visible. Sorted by recency.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /super-admin/analytics and /super-admin/performance.
Expected Result: User engagement metrics + performance data shown. Graphs and charts render. Data matches Firebase Analytics.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /super-admin/manage-admins. 2. Add new admin email. 3. Try removing primary owner.
Expected Result: Admin added to Firestore admin list. Primary owner cannot be removed. Removed (non-primary) admin loses access immediately.

Steps: 1. Navigate to /super-admin/subscriptions.
Expected Result: Users with subscriptions expiring within 30 days listed. Contact details visible. Can take action (extend/notify).
Pre-Condition: Admin access + users with expiring plans

Steps: 1. Fresh install app on mid-range device. 2. Time from splash screen to dashboard ready.
Expected Result: All Firebase services (Auth + Firestore + FCM + Analytics + AppCheck + RemoteConfig) initialize in parallel. Dashboard loads < 3 seconds on 4G.

Steps: 1. Set maintenanceMode=true in Firebase Remote Config. 2. Open app.
Expected Result: Maintenance screen blocks all access. No feature accessible. Correct maintenance message shown. Cannot bypass.

Steps: 1. Set minimumVersion higher than current app version in Remote Config. 2. Open app.
Expected Result: Force update screen shown. Play Store / download link provided. User cannot bypass. App unusable until updated.

Steps: 1. Set announcement text in Remote Config. 2. Force fetch config. 3. Open app.
Expected Result: Announcement banner shows at top of screen. Correct text displayed. Dismissible. Stays dismissed until next announcement change.

Steps: 1. Login with new shop (no products or bills yet). 2. Check onboarding steps displayed.
Expected Result: Checklist shows steps: add products + create first bill + set up printer etc. Steps check off as completed. Disappears when all done.

Steps: 1. Open app on mobile (< 600px width). 2. Tap each bottom nav item. 3. Tap 'More' for additional items.
Expected Result: 4 primary items + 'More' button visible. Each navigates correctly. Active tab highlighted. 'More' opens sheet with full menu.

Steps: 1. Open app on desktop (> 1024px width). 2. Click through sidebar items. 3. Toggle sidebar collapse.
Expected Result: Full sidebar shows all nav items with icons + labels. Collapse toggle hides labels (icons only). Selected item highlighted.

Steps: 1. Open on desktop and resize browser width: 1920px > 1024px > 600px > 375px.
Expected Result: Layout transitions smoothly: sidebar to tablet layout to mobile bottom nav. No overflow errors. Content reflows correctly.

Steps: 1. Register new account. 2. Check for privacy/terms consent prompt before proceeding.
Expected Result: DPDP Act compliant consent collected. Privacy Policy and Terms links open correct pages (restaurants.tulasierp.com). Consent version stored in Firestore.

Steps: 1. Set newer version available in Remote Config. 2. Open Windows app.
Expected Result: Update banner shown at top. 'Download Update' starts MSIX download. Install prompt after download completes.

Steps: 1. Leave optional update available in Remote Config. 2. Open Windows app and wait 30+ seconds.
Expected Result: MSIX downloaded silently in background. No UI interruption during download. Install available on next launch.

Steps: 1. Publish newer version to Play Store. 2. Open app on Android.
Expected Result: In-app update prompt appears (flexible or immediate based on version gap). Update installs via Google Play.

Steps: 1. On dev machine open terminal in project root. 2. Run ./smart-deploy.ps1. 3. Answer prompts (version + platforms). 4. Wait for completion.
Expected Result: Selected platforms built and deployed. Web to Firebase Hosting. Android APK/AAB built. Windows MSIX packaged. Version JSON files updated.

Steps: 1. After web deploy open https://stores.tulasierp.com/app in browser.
Expected Result: Latest version loads. Version in Settings matches build. No console errors. Login and core features work.

Steps: 1. Open https://stores.tulasierp.com in browser.
Expected Result: Landing page loads: features + pricing + download links. All navigation pages work: about + support + privacy + terms.

Steps: 1. Open /pay?pa=merchant@okaxis&am=100 in browser.
Expected Result: Payment page loads. QR code shown on desktop. UPI redirect on mobile. Amount pre-filled correctly.

Steps: 1. Deploy new version. 2. Hard refresh browser (Ctrl+Shift+R). 3. Check Network tab.
Expected Result: New version loads. Service worker fetches fresh resources. No stale cached assets served.

Steps: 1. Open download page on marketing site.
Expected Result: Android APK and Windows MSIX download links show correct version numbers matching latest deployed build.

Steps: 1. Use app for 30+ minutes continuously. 2. Create bills + browse reports + navigate all screens + open/close modals.
Expected Result: No memory leaks + frame drops + or crashes. Navigation returns to correct states. App remains responsive throughout.

Steps: 1. Load shop with 100+ products + 500+ bills + 50+ customers. 2. Navigate POS + bills + khata + reports.
Expected Result: All lists load smoothly with pagination. Search and filter responsive. No UI jank or ANR.

Steps: 1. Enable TalkBack on Android. 2. Navigate POS + bills + settings using gestures.
Expected Result: All buttons read meaningful labels. Form fields announced correctly. No silent touchable areas. Tab order logical.

Steps: 1. Open web app on desktop. 2. Navigate using Tab + Enter + Escape only.
Expected Result: All interactive elements reachable via keyboard. Focus indicators visible. Dialogs trap focus. Escape closes modals.

Steps: 1. Force kill app during bill creation. 2. Reopen app immediately.
Expected Result: App recovers gracefully. No data corruption. Incomplete bill either saved as draft or cleanly discarded. No crash loop.

Steps: 1. Use app for 2+ days with default retention settings. 2. Check for old draft/temp data.
Expected Result: Old draft bills + expired caches + stale temp data cleaned per retention policy. Active data untouched.

Steps: 1. Open web app. 2. Go offline (DevTools Network > Offline). 3. Navigate between screens.
Expected Result: Static assets (images + fonts + icons) load from service worker cache. Non-data screens render correctly offline.

Steps: 1. Open web app in Chrome on Android. 2. Accept install prompt or use menu > 'Add to Home Screen'.
Expected Result: PWA installable. Icon appears on home screen. Opens in standalone mode without browser chrome. Manifest.json correct.
